details.name: drawer_opens_on_help_btn_click
details.detail:
### Result
true
### Ran Playwright code
```js
await (async page => { return await page.evaluate(() => { const d = document.querySelector('.drawer'); return d ? d.classList.contains('open') : false; })

details.name: search_input_focused_after_open
details.detail:
### Result
true
### Ran Playwright code
```js
await (async page => { return await page.evaluate(() => { return document.activeElement && document.activeElement.id === 'help-search'; }); })(page);
```
